title: A UFO was sighted hovering over Londrina’s Airport [2011]
excerpt: JULY 16th, 2011. At 8:15 pm. Three witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object “practically stopped” about 20 nautical miles from the east sector of Londrina Airport. The UFO consisted of flashing lights in blue, red and green and it was moving slowly from North to South. The three witnesses who spotted the UFO hovering over […]
text_preview: JULY 16th, 2011. At 8:15 pm. Three witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object “practically stopped” about 20 nautical miles from the east sector of Londrina Airport. The UFO consisted of flashing lights in blue, red and green and it was moving slowly from North to South. The three witnesses who spotted the UFO hovering over the Londrina’s Airport for 8 minutes are two Airport Approach Control Center employees and a commercial pilot. Their reports coincide, as additional notes from the COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] show: “A COLLEAGUE FROM APP-LO, CALLED APP-LO ABO
summary: Two airport ATC employees and a commercial pilot observed a slowly moving UFO with flashing blue, red, and green lights hovering ~20NM east of Londrina Airport for 8 minutes.
